case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. GLEN OH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ERICA L. BRACHFELD FILED RE: CCP 1033 B (1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OH, GLEN $2,085.89 PRINCIPAL, $358.89 INTEREST, $268.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,712.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED MAR-18-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OH, GLEN

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY BRACHFELD, ERICA L

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT OH, GLEN DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-17-2009
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $268.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OH, GLEN
DECLARATION RICKY EVANS FILED RE: CCP 585(A) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
